role: Tanker mission support and save contact

summary.en: Snake's remote technical partner during the Tanker Incident.
summary.fr: Partenaire technique a distance de Snake pendant l'incident du tanker.

biography.en: Otacon coordinates infiltration, records mission data and analyzes the new Metal Gear threat from outside the tanker.
biography.fr: Otacon coordonne l'infiltration, enregistre les donnees et analyse la nouvelle menace Metal Gear depuis l'exterieur du tanker.

relations.label: Partner
relations.detail: Co-founder of Philanthropy and Snake's primary remote support.

relations.label: Half-sister
relations.detail: A strained family bond central to the Plant chapter.

loreNotes: Uses separate support and save channels during the Tanker chapter.

summary.en: Raiden's commanding voice, later exposed as an artificial construct.
summary.fr: Voix de commandement de Raiden, revelee ensuite comme une construction artificielle.

biography.en: The Colonel interface guides Raiden through the Big Shell exercise while filtering information through the Patriots' simulation.
biography.fr: L'interface du Colonel guide Raiden dans Big Shell tout en filtrant les informations par la simulation des Patriots.

relations.label: Command subject
relations.detail: Directs Raiden and shapes his perception of the mission.

relations.label: Paired construct
relations.detail: Shares the support channel and later the GW breakdown.

loreNotes: The late-game channel must visibly degrade after GW corruption begins.

summary.en: Raiden's save contact and emotional link outside the operation.
summary.fr: Contact de sauvegarde de Raiden et lien emotionnel avec l'exterieur de l'operation.

biography.en: Rose records mission data while personal conversations expose Raiden's memory, identity and relationship conflicts.
biography.fr: Rose enregistre la mission tandis que les conversations personnelles revelent les conflits de memoire, d'identite et de couple de Raiden.

loreNotes: Personal calls should evolve as Raiden's constructed mission unravels.

summary.en: A field operative whose borrowed identity conceals Solid Snake.
summary.fr: Operateur de terrain dont l'identite d'emprunt dissimule Solid Snake.

biography.en: Pliskin advises Raiden from inside Big Shell before revealing his role in the wider Metal Gear crisis.
biography.fr: Pliskin conseille Raiden depuis Big Shell avant de reveler son role dans la crise Metal Gear.

relations.label: Field ally
relations.detail: Offers practical advice and challenges the official narrative.

loreNotes: Identity presentation changes after the Harrier sequence.

summary.en: Explosives expert guiding the search for Fatman's C4 charges.
summary.fr: Expert en explosifs guidant la recherche des charges C4 de Fatman.

biography.en: Stillman teaches Raiden how to identify and freeze C4 while confronting the consequences of his former student.
biography.fr: Stillman apprend a Raiden a identifier et geler le C4 tout en affrontant les consequences de son ancien eleve.

relations.label: Former student
relations.detail: A destructive legacy that shapes the bomb-disposal operation.

loreNotes: Available only during the bomb-disposal phase.

summary.en: A masked informant sending classified warnings to Raiden.
summary.fr: Informateur masque envoyant des avertissements classifies a Raiden.

biography.en: Olga uses the Mr. X identity to steer Raiden while protecting her child under Patriots coercion.
biography.fr: Olga utilise l'identite Mr. X pour orienter Raiden tout en protegeant son enfant sous la contrainte des Patriots.

relations.label: Protected subject
relations.detail: Secretly keeps Raiden alive for the Patriots' plan.

loreNotes: Primarily incoming-only and revealed late in the Plant chapter.

summary.en: Programmer capable of attacking GW with a specialized virus.
summary.fr: Programmeuse capable d'attaquer GW avec un virus specialise.

biography.en: Emma explains Arsenal's information-control architecture and prepares the virus upload while confronting her history with Otacon.
biography.fr: Emma explique l'architecture de controle de l'information d'Arsenal et prepare le virus tout en affrontant son histoire avec Otacon.

relations.label: Half-brother
relations.detail: A painful family relationship revisited during the escort.

loreNotes: Available during the late Shell 2 and Arsenal operation.
